title: Missing Characters in 30 and Beyond split
display_title: Missing Characters in 30 and Beyond split
wikitext:
[]: Missing Characters in 3.0 & Beyond [split]             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue Apr 15, 2014 11:12 am [Split from "Characters' Appearances Pre- and Post-Timeskip" . - Monk] [Topic title changed from "Pen Pen (or lack thereof) in 3.0 & Beyond [split]" on 2014-04-17. - Monk] So, did Pen Pen really die then inbetween the two films? Maybe he just went into hiding? Or did he, like maybe fuse with he Wunder? I don't know.... god, I hope Final explains this stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Apr 15, 2014 11:34 am Well, according to da Internet, a typical penguin longevity is between 15 and 20 years. Assuming that Pen Pen was a few years old in NGE and/or that his genetic modification (if the manga lore applies here) didn't affected his lifespan, it's possible that he's still alive after the time skip, but he'll be far from the vitality of his early youth. That's it, if he didn't died violently meanwhile of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Tue Apr 15, 2014 11:47 am Dataprime wrote: So, did Pen Pen really die then inbetween the two films? Maybe he just went into hiding? Or did he, like maybe fuse with he Wunder? I don't know.... god, I hope Final explains this stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Apr 15, 2014 11:54 am Mari and Asuka are clones, the Wunder is Pen Pen's final form, and Misato knows one weird little secret that prevents wrinkles and breast sagging. Dermatologists hate her!

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Tue Apr 15, 2014 1:24 pm PEN PEN WANTS A HUUUUG!!!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Apr 15, 2014 2:32 pm Chuckman wrote: the Wunder is Pen Pen's final form,

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Apr 15, 2014 7:08 pm After Third Impact Misato & Ritsuko needed a meal when food got really scarce. ...He was delicious.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Apr 16, 2014 2:44 am Some mod wrote: Getting a 403 Forbidden on that image link

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 16, 2014 3:15 am Just as a note, we know that Pen 2 was living with the Horaki family. If they're dead, then Pen 2 is likely dead as well.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Apr 16, 2014 4:29 am ^ That was only in NGE, in Rebuild we never got a scene of Misato sending Pen² to the Horakis, we just know that he ended in the shot of Kensuke, Hikari and Toji looking at Zeruel, which is so far the last time we see any of them. We don't even know how Pen² ended here, maybe he just joined the evacuating population and met with the three others, who know him because of their friendship with Shinji and Asuka. (Pen² was present in the Aquarium visit, and it's very probably that the three had gone visiting Shinji and/or Asuka in the apartment of screen)

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Apr 16, 2014 10:45 am Chuckman wrote: Misato knows one weird little secret that prevents wrinkles and breast sagging. Dermatologists hate her!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 16, 2014 12:02 pm ElMariachi wrote: ^ That was only in NGE, in Rebuild we never got a scene of Misato sending Pen² to the Horakis, we just know that he ended in the shot of Kensuke, Hikari and Toji looking at Zeruel, which is so far the last time we see any of them.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 16, 2014 3:26 pm We see Pen Pen and Misato in the scene where Shinji leaves Misato's/quits Nerv. The next and last time we see Pen Pen is the evacuation shelters (added to the 2.22 version, he was absent in 2.0) , so I think we're supposed to infer that Misato sent him away for safety.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Apr 16, 2014 4:07 pm Last time we saw him, he was with Touji. Touji is so dead they recicled his shirt.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 16, 2014 4:12 pm Pen Pen existed as a comic relief, and the time for comedy has now passed. You can thank Shinji for that one too.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Apr 16, 2014 7:34 pm I'm pretty sure Pen Pen is also God in NTE, as well as in the television show. That's why things have gone to hell. They lost God somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Apr 16, 2014 9:15 pm Kendrix wrote: Touji is so dead they recicled his shirt.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Wed Apr 16, 2014 9:19 pm He's dead, Guy. As dead as that squirrel there.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 16, 2014 10:07 pm While I agree that it is very likely that Touji is dead, I'm with Guy here. We simply don't have enough evidence to know for a fact that he's dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Apr 16, 2014 11:33 pm Toji and Hikari live in a big bubble city growing melons and pot . Kaji is probably there, too. The people in the Wille fleet can't be the only humans left on Earth. Somebody in said fleet is smart enough to realize that if they're it, humans no longer have a viable breeding population and they might as well all go get high and have a big orgy until they die of old age.

 a big bubble city growing melons and pot . Kaji is probably there, too. The people in the Wille fleet can't be the only humans left on Earth. Somebody in said fleet is smart enough to realize that if they're it, humans no longer have a viable breeding population and they might as well all go get high and have a big orgy until they die of old age.
